signals.description: T. Rowe Price termination on 2025-11-04 resulted in ~$2B reallocated to cash within the CRF public equities portfolio
CVC Capital Partners Globetrotter SCSp $13.42M funded from rollover capital out of CVC Asia Pacific Fund IV, L.P.
Stonepeak Global Renewables Fund II Co-Investment ($80M) invests alongside Stonepeak Global Renewables Fund II, L.P. ($243.545M), both closed Nov 3, 2025
CVC DIF Management received two separate commitments of €250M each (DIF Infrastructure VIII and DIF Value-Add IV), both closed Nov 18, 2025
All active investments in November 2025 were with existing CRF relationships; no new manager relationships initiated
